- "Stride (%llu) at index %lu should be equal to %s's dimensions at index %lu (%llu) * stride at index %lu (%llu) (%llu) when using MTLTensorUsageMachineLearning"
- "Stride (%llu) at index %lu should be greater than 0"
- "Stride (%llu) at index 0 should be 1"
- "Stride (%llu) at index 1 should be aligned to 64 bytes when using MTLTensorUsageMachineLearning"
- "Stride at index 0 (%llu) should be 1 when using MTLTensorUsageMachineLearning"
- "Stride at index 1 (%llu elements, %llu bytes, %llu bits) should be 64-byte (512-bit) aligned when using MTLTensorUsageMachineLearning"
- "Strides should not be nil when using [MTLBuffer newTensorWithDescriptor:offset:error:] and dimensions.rank > 0"
